untranslatable_reason: This signal requires detecting valuation extremes, sentiment divergence, and technical deterioration as early warning signals 6+ months prior to an event. These concepts (valuation metrics, sentiment indices, regime change prediction) cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian). The signal is fundamentally a regime-change anticipation strategy requiring macroeconomic data, valuation ratios, and sentiment data not available in the indicator set. Approximated entry with volatility spike and Bollinger Band extension, but this does not capture the core early-warning logic.
translation_notes: Signal is primarily narrative/strategic (defensive positioning, contingency planning, capital preservation) rather than rule-based. The 6-month lead time and event confirmation approach cannot be mechanically translated into technical conditions. Approximated with volatility indicators as proxy for regime change, but true translation would require external regime detection, valuation data, and event-based triggers outside the allowed indicator universe.
